title: How Starlink is SpaceX's key to making big 'star bucks'
summary: SpaceX (SPCX) canceled the test launch of its latest Starship rocket on Thursday due to engine ignition failure. The space venture's stock sinks lower ahead of Friday's close after already dropping below its mega-IPO price earlier this week. William Blair research analyst of industrials Louie DiPalma — whose firm maintains an Outperform rating on SpaceX's stock — comes on to talk more about the opportunities and risks ahead for Elon Musk's company.

title: Oracle's stock crash looks embarrassing for billionaire founder Larry Ellison
summary: Oracle stock has sunk to the ocean floor, and it's unclear what will bring it back afloat.

title: Stock Market Today, July 17: Stocks Slide as Semiconductor Rout Deepens
summary: Chip stocks tumbled amid geopolitical tensions and valuation concerns, while Travelers surged on earnings, today, July 17, 2026.

title: Tesla and Alphabet Earnings: The Metrics That Matter Most
summary: A duo of Magnificent 7 members, namely Tesla (TSLA) and Alphabet (GOOGL), will help headline the reporting docket this week, who both head into their reports with favorable revisions for both earnings and sales.

title: Meta in talks to rent some of its billions in AI infrastructure to Anthropic
summary: Meta is in talks with Anthropic about leasing computing capacity to the AI startup. It’s a move that could put the social media giant in competition with Amazon, Microsoft and Google in a new line of business: cloud computing.

title: Dow Jones Futures: Google, Tesla, AMD Loom After AI Stock Sell-Off
summary: Google earnings and capex guidance will be key for battered AI stocks. Tesla, Intel, GE Vernova also will report.

title: Here’s What Can End Micron’s Stock Pain
summary: Micron closed below the $1 trillion market cap threshold on Thursday for the first time since June 5, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

title: SpaceX Reportedly In Talks To Supply Pentagon With AI Computing Power Worth Billions
summary: The two sides are negotiating an arrangement under which SpaceX would provide computing capacity to the department at a cost of up to several billion dollars, according to a report in the Wall Street Journal.

title: Micron, Nvidia, Netflix, SK Hynix, Alphabet, Intuitive Surgical, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: FEATURE  Tech was hit again on Friday by the worsening selloff in chip makers and other AI stocks.  Advanced Micro Devices advanced 1% and Intel dropped 2%. Applied Materials was down 5.6% and Corning fell 2.
